task_completion.description: Create a new custom block named 'Qualification Metrics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new block or section titled 'Qualification Metrics' is visible in the Leads module layout editor.

task_completion.description: Position the 'Qualification Metrics' block below the 'Lead Details' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Qualification Metrics' block is visually placed underneath the 'Lead Details' block in the layout editor screen.

task_completion.description: Relocate the 'Industry' field into the 'Qualification Metrics' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Industry' field is visible inside the newly created 'Qualification Metrics' block.

task_completion.description: Relocate the 'Annual Revenue' field into the 'Qualification Metrics' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Annual Revenue' field is visible inside the newly created 'Qualification Metrics' block.

task_completion.description: Relocate the 'No Of Employees' field into the 'Qualification Metrics' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'No Of Employees' field is visible inside the newly created 'Qualification Metrics' block.
The 'Fax' field is shown with a hidden indicator (e.g., a crossed-out eye icon), moved to a 'Hidden Fields' or 'Inactive Fields' section, or is no longer visible in the active layout blocks.
A success message or toast notification indicating the layout was saved successfully, or the screen transitions away from the editor showing the applied changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CRM's graphical user interface to modify the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the CRM's layout editor, not a terminal window executing database queries or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual layout editor elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping fields, clicking edit icons, or using the CRM's built-in layout management tools, rather than editing source code files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from actual system changes and not browser developer tools spoofing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to merely alter the text of the page to match the expected block names or field locations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target custom block must be named exactly 'Qualification Metrics'. The fields that must be moved into this block are 'Industry', 'Annual Revenue', and 'No Of Employees'. The field that must be hidden is 'Fax'.
